Global Control Register

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x100
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Master enable and global configuration

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:2] RSVD r 0x0 -
[1] GLOBAL_RST rw 0x0 -
[0] GLOBAL_EN rw 0x0 -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

GLOBAL_RST

Global reset - resets all channels and state machines

GLOBAL_EN

Global enable - master switch for entire STREAM engine
